══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aven — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Aven — Armored Tank HP: 45/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Aven — Armored Tank HP: 27/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aven — Armored Tank --- HP: 27/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aven — Armored Tank --- HP: 27/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Aven — Armored Tank HP: 2/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):9+4=13 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Aven — Armored Tank --- HP: 2/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (2/59). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aven — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Aven — Armored Tank HP: -13/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
